texto: The core of your true self is never lost. Let go of all the pretending and the becoming you've done just to belong.Curl up with your rawness and come home. You don't have to find yourself
autor: you just have to let yourself in.
explicacao: Orientação direta de you just have to let yourself in. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “The core of your true self is never lost. Let go of all the pretending and the becoming you've do…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, d-antoinette-foy, never, útil em momentos de termino e reflexao.
